response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video. The first segment (00:00-03:31) is an introduction/trailer for guests, with no vocal performance. 2. Identified the vocal performance in the second segment (03:31-05:03). 3. Used on-screen text at 03:33 ('エルフ', '作詞・作曲：てにをは') to identify the song as 'Elf' by Teniwoha. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the performance in the video, as they were clear and matched the song's audio. 5. Translated the transcribed lyrics into English. 6. Compiled all metadata into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional trailer for Takane Lui's birthday live event 'Luminous Stairs', showcasing the event's guests followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Elf' (エルフ) by Takane Lui.

scenes.description: Promotional trailer for 'Luminous Stairs' featuring a montage of VTuber guests (GUEST 01-14). No vocal music is played during this segment.
Takane Lui performs the song 'Elf' (エルフ). The screen displays 'エルフ' and '作詞・作曲：てにをは' indicating the title and composer.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
走りなさい 早く もっと 早く
悲しみに追いつかれないように
探しなさい あかりの灯る道を
それは それは まばゆいでしょう

挑みなさい 君のうつくしや
尊さを傷つけ続けるものに
眠りなさい 疲れたなら眠りなさい
神話を持たない あの星座のように

手を離したあと 君は気づくだろう
指の形 太陽 その名残りが
胸を刺す

忘れたことも 忘れてしまえ
悲しみも ぬくもりも 消えてしまえ
されど 今も 耳に残るのは
ただ 咲いた 言葉を願うような...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Run quickly, more quickly,
So that you are not caught by sadness.
Search for the path lit by light,
That, that must be dazzling.

Challenge the thing
That continues to hurt your beauty and preciousness.
Sleep, if you are tired, sleep,
Like that constellation that has no myth.

After letting go of your hand, you will realize,
The shape of the fingers, the sun, those remnants
Stab the chest.

Forget that you even forgot,
Let the sadness, let the warmth fade away.
Yet, what remains in my ears even now
Is just the wishing for the words that bloomed...
